theme_notes: Today's lines draw from Bulgaria's shock Eurovision 2026 win in Vienna (Dara's anthem besting 24 nations), Trump's Beijing summit with Xi Jinping, Israel eliminating Hamas's military chief, Ukraine launching its largest-ever drone strike near Moscow, and Kevin Warsh being Senate-confirmed as Fed Chair — with the PSG-Arsenal Champions League final looming on May 30.
settled: You're square. Even Bulgaria didn't see that coming.
Zero. Historic. Like Trump actually landing in Beijing.
Settled. Tonight the drones are someone else's problem.
youOwe: Less than a Eurovision protest sign in Vienna. Still noted.
Dara won Eurovision on vibes alone. You have neither vibes nor money.
The Trump-Xi summit had higher stakes. Barely.
Ukraine sent more drones at Moscow than you've sent payment reminders.
That's one Trump tariff on a single bottle of wine. Very on brand.
Kevin Warsh was confirmed to run the Fed. He wouldn't approve of you.
Bulgaria won Eurovision on this budget. You can't clear a dinner tab.
Trump got a better deal from China than you got from this relationship.
Arsenal made the Champions League final. You can't make a payment.
Xi Jinping warned of 'conflict.' You've already caused one.
Israel ended a military career today. Your partner might end yours.
Kevin Warsh just got Senate-confirmed. Your debt should be this official.
PSG and Arsenal are playing for a trophy. You're playing for your dignity.
At this number, Xi Jinping would call it a structural trade imbalance.
You owe enough to relocate to a country not currently being droned.
Geopolitically significant. Blinken should be mediating.
Ukraine launched fewer drones at Moscow than your partner launched guilt trips.
Dara sang about freedom in Vienna. You haven't been free since you downloaded this.
theyOwe: They owe you Eurovision-trophy money. Pocket change. Still collect.
Technically in debt. Like every nation watching the Trump-Xi summit nervously.
This is the financial equivalent of a Eurovision nil douze points.
Arsenal overcame bigger deficits against Atletico. Your partner has no excuse.
One Trump tariff on a nice dinner. You deserve at least the dinner.
They owe you enough to fund a protest sign in Vienna. Frame it.
Xi Jinping called this 'a manageable imbalance.' You disagree.
They owe you a Eurovision front-row seat. You'd rather have the cash.
Arsenal beat Atletico by less on aggregate. You're winning by more.
Kevin Warsh would raise rates. You should raise hell.
This debt has outlasted more peace deals than we can name.
The Iran ceasefire talks are going smoother than their repayment plan.
You are their personal Federal Reserve. No cuts are coming.
PSG vs Arsenal for a trophy. You vs them for your own money back.
They're treating your account like Trump treated Beijing — pure audacity.
Five figures. This is a trade dispute now. Tariffs apply.
At this scale, even Xi Jinping would warn of potential conflict.
Bulgaria won Eurovision and got a trophy. You got an IOU. Demand more.
